What should one do before constructing a house ?
5T^3^5rt ^T^T: Sf^T^t ^ I
fTc^T ||^||

488 Brhat SamhiiS.
The owner of land who wishes to construct a house should go at
a time prescribed by the astrologer to the worthy site which has been
ploughed, where sown seeds have sprouted, and where Brahmanas
and cows have stayed for a night, worship the deities with varieties
of eatables, curds, coloured rice, fragrant flowers and incense, and
honour Brahmanas and architects. Then touching his head, breast,
thighs or feet, according as he is a Brahmana, Ksatriya, VaUya or
Sudra, he (owner) should draw a line (with any object held in the
hand) on the ground, at the commencement of the construction of
a house.
